state_variables.label: Next Topic
state_variables.description: The next topic to be visited

state_variables.label: Patient Address Line 1
state_variables.description: Street address line 1 — house/building number and street name only.

nodes.description: Top-level router. Sends the user to patient intake.

tools.name: go_to_intake
tools.description: Route to patient intake when the user wants an appointment.

nodes.label: Router

state_updates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Determine whether the user wants to book an appointment.

nodes.description: Gather address line 1, city, and email — one field at a time.

state_updates.patient_address_line1: result.patient_address_line1 if "patient_address_line1" in result else state.patient_address_line1

state_updates.patient_city: result.patient_city if "patient_city" in result else state.patient_city

state_updates.patient_email: result.patient_email if "patient_email" in result else state.patient_email

tools.name: capture_patient_intake_fields
tools.description: Capture fields as the user provides them.

tools.name: cancel_patient_intake_collect
tools.description: Stop collecting and return to the start when the user changes their mind, cancels, says never mind, or asks for something else instead.

nodes.label: Patient Intake

state_updates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Ask the user for patient_address_line1. Use exactly this message: "Please provide the first line of your address (house/building number and street name only)." When they answer, call capture_patient_intake_fields with patient_address_line1.

before_reasoning_iteration.enabled: state.patient_address_line1 is not None and state.patient_city is None

state_updates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Ask the user for patient_city. Use exactly this message: "Please provide your town or city." When they answer, call capture_patient_intake_fields with patient_city.

before_reasoning_iteration.enabled: state.patient_address_line1 is not None and (state.patient_city is not None and state.patient_email is None)

state_updates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Ask the user for patient_email. Use exactly this message: "Please provide your email address." When they answer, call capture_patient_intake_fields with patient_email.

before_reasoning_iteration.enabled: state.patient_address_line1 is not None and (state.patient_city is not None and state.patient_email is not None)

state_updates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
All required details are collected. Do not ask for anything further.

before_reasoning_iteration.enabled: state.patient_address_line1 is None or (state.patient_city is None or state.patient_email is None)

state_updates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
If the user changes their mind, cancels, says never mind, or asks for something else instead, do not ask for the next field — call cancel_patient_intake_collect instead.

after_reasoning.enabled: (state.patient_address_line1 is None or (state.patient_city is None or state.patient_email is None)) and state.AgentScriptInternal_next_topic=="__EMPTY__"
